title: Delaware North India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Delaware North India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Delaware North India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Mysuru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Delaware North India:
Delaware North India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delaware North India!
